Wikipedia article

A small mammalian carnivore. It is usually domestic and hunts vermin.

Cats are domestic animals, and one of the most common creatures in a typical dwarven fortress, spending their time killing vermin and creating messes for their owners to dispose of. They are fairly weak animals in combat (but combat can be quite …
